content.en:
A period of time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian broke the boundary again, and now he had broken the boundary fifty-six times, and the Endless Yuan Dao had also improved slightly.

The boundary of the Hanhai region, somewhere in the silent Black Sea.

The void here began to distort, and a special force emerged.

In an instant, a huge ancient stone monument gradually emerged, and its power radiated to the surrounding territory, turning this place into a special Dao domain.

And this ancient stele is the original antiquity holy dao stele!

At first, the Holy Dao Monument was still shaking, but it quickly stabilized.

And just after the Holy Dao Monument appeared at the boundary of the Hanhai District, an eightfold ancestor shuttled over and stood in a relatively distant position of the Holy Dao Monument.

They couldn't get too close to the Holy Dao Monument, otherwise so many Yae Primordial Ancestors approached together, which was very likely to cause a sense of crisis in the Holy Dao Monument, so they would directly attack.

And those half-step eightfold ancestors, sevenfold ancestors, and half-step sevenfold ancestors did not pose a threat to the Holy Dao Monument at all, so no matter how many they came, they couldn't cause a reaction from the Holy Dao Monument.

......

"The Holy Dao Monument is already absorbing the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary, and it won't move for a short time!" said the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor.

"It's a pity that I can't find the old nest of the Holy Dao Monument, otherwise I can find a lot of Holy Dao Monuments, and I'm afraid that there will be a large number of Yae Origin Ancestors who will do it!" said another Yae Origin Ancestor.

"Forget it, if you really find the lair of the Holy Dao Monument, how much price will you have to pay to break it? Maybe there is a Holy Dao Monument comparable to the level of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor!"

"It's time to inform the other Dao Ancestors and let them come here to cultivate!"

Immediately, these Eightfold Origin Ancestors notified the forces of the Hanhai District Boundary one by one.

In addition, there are other half-step Eightfold Ancestors of the Territorial Boundary who have come, although the Hanhai Boundary has blocked the boundary of the Continental Boundary during this period, but some of the Eightfold Ancestors can still bring some half-step Eightfold Ancestors over, and the Hanhai Boundary cannot stop it.

Therefore, there are still some sevenfold ancestors and half-step eightfold ancestors who have entered the realm of the Hanhai District this time.

Soon.

One by one, the Dao Ancestors of the great forces came, and Ye Tian also followed the many Dao Ancestors of the Xuanyu Pavilion.

Woohoo Woo Woo !!!

One by one, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor entered the most marginal area of the Holy Dao Tablet Dao Domain, and then tried to go deeper, the pressure and strange power in the underworld made it impossible for them to enter an inch.

And when Ye Tian entered the Dao domain of the Holy Dao Monument, he also felt great pressure and needed to resist with the power of the Endless Yuan Dao.

If you don't go deeper, the pressure is fine, but once you move, the pressure hits, and the Endless Yuan Dao is very difficult to resist.

"This Dao Domain is a little weird, it's okay if you don't move, the pressure will come when you move! If you want to go deep into the Dao Domain, you have to keep moving, keep going deep, without strong strength and extremely high Yuan Dao realm, you can't go far at all. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, the Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor used his strength to wrap Ye Tian and several other half-step sevenfold ancestors of the Xuanyu Pavilion, and continued to penetrate into the Dao Domain.

With the help of the Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian easily entered the inner perimeter of the Holy Dao Tablet Dao Domain, and approached the most core area.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian and Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor stayed in one area, and the deeper area was where the half-step Eightfold Ancestor was staying.

At this moment, there was already a half-step eightfold ancestor sitting cross-legged.

"So many half-step Yae Ancestors!"

Ye Tian saw the figures one by one, and felt a little emotion in his heart.

Some of the half-step eightfold ancestors are not estimated to be the half-step eightfold ancestors of the Hanhai District boundary, but a considerable part of them should be the native half-step eightfold ancestors of the Hanhai District boundary.

It is said that there are several half-step eightfold ancestors in Hanhai Palace, and there are more or less one or even two other top powers.

It should be, there are probably dozens of half-step eightfold ancestors in the entire Hanhai District Boundary!

This number is not much, after all, more half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors have left the Hanhai District Boundary, and now they may not get the news, so they will naturally not come back.

"You are here to practice enlightenment, don't move, otherwise the consequences will be very serious!" Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor reminded Ye Tian and the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian and the others waited for a half-step sevenfold ancestor to respond.

......

Ye Tian didn't care about other things, and directly began to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

Under the influence of the Holy Dao Monument, his speed of comprehension at the moment was too fast.

"What a terrifying effect, I have a large number of Yuan Dao ancestors, and I am here to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao, and the effect is simply against the sky!!"

Ye Tian quickly immersed himself in the cultivation comprehension, and the progress of the Endless Yuan Dao increased rapidly.

The years passed.

There are countless Dao Ancestors all over this Dao Domain, and one Dao Ancestor sits cross-legged here, and some Dao Ancestors even compress their bodies and turn into a particle to comprehend here, so that they don't take up space!

After all, there are too many outermost Dao Ancestors, and the dense half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor has almost occupied the space, and if it doesn't turn into particles, it will have to be squeezed with other Dao Ancestors, and maybe there will be contradictions.

And the middle area is almost all the Sevenfold Ancestor Enlightenment cultivation area, which is not crowded, but from a distance, it looks like it is also densely packed.

In the area where Ye Tian is located, the space is very spacious, after all, without the cultivation of the peak of the Sevenfold Ancestor, they can't enter here!

Gradually, the powerhouses of the Hanhai District Realm almost gathered here, and the scene was incomparably spectacular.

As the years passed, one by one Dao ancestors came here to comprehend the Yuan Dao.

The outermost Dao Ancestor, the effect of enlightenment is average, and the most core is the half-step eightfold primordial ancestor, the Yuan Dao has reached the consummation realm, and it is extremely difficult to step into the extreme realm.

Therefore, the progress of these Dao Ancestors will not be fast, but only Ye Tian, the speed of progress is simply terrifying.

this day.

Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao finally ushered in a small breakthrough.

"The Endless Yuan Dao has comprehended the entry peak realm, so fast, it seems that it won't be long before I can comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao of the Xiaocheng realm!!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited in his heart, but he didn't show it, and even the advanced Endless Yuan Dao, he hid his aura and didn't leak it.

Therefore, the other Dao Ancestors didn't know that his Yuan Dao realm had broken through!

After another period of time, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao finally broke through again, and it was a big breakthrough!

Rumble!!!

The Endless Yuan Dao is transforming, from the peak of entry to the realm of Xiaocheng!

You must know that many of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestors are at the peak, and the ones with weaker strength are only the ones who are Xiaocheng!

And Ye Tian's comprehension is still the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and it is even more difficult to cultivate and comprehend, and the difficulty coefficient is not at the same level at all.

But even so, Ye Tian still comprehended the Endless Yuan Dao to the Xiaocheng realm so quickly.

"It seems that this time there is hope to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao to the Dacheng realm at one time!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.
